mapper.select: SELECT id, currency, sku, quantity, payment_time FROM ebay_sales
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ebay_sales (platform_order_no, currency, sku, quantity, payment_time) VALUES
(#{m.platformOrderNo}, #{m.currency}, #{m.sku}, #{m.quantity}, #{m.paymentTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = VALUES(quantity), payment_time = VALUES(payment_time), upload_time = NOW()
